visualizations.title: Least Common Multiple Definition
visualizations.description: The smallest positive integer that is a multiple of both numbers.

steps.explanation: Intersection: The set of positive numbers that are multiples of both a and b.
Minimum: Selecting the smallest positive element in that shared set.

visualizations.title: LCM Hop Alignment (4 vs 6)
visualizations.description: Watch jumps of 4 (top) and jumps of 6 (bottom) align at the number 12, demonstrating the Least Common Multiple.
